title: 2-way Shopify Integration
excerpt: I think that connecting Shopify to Monday would provide a really helpful use case in terms of being able to send user data back and forth between the two platforms.

posts.author: AdvDesigns (Aaron Densmore)
posts.cookedHtml: I think that connecting Shopify to Monday would provide a really helpful use case in terms of being able to send user data back and forth between the two platforms.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AdvDesigns - this can be easily achieved via make.com and customized to your specific requirements. monday actually had a dedicated native Shopify integration 3 or 4 years ago but it has since been deprecated.

If you ever want to learn more about connecting monday and Shopify feel free to reach out anytime.

Thanks,
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Aaron! My team is working on an advanced integration between monday.com and shopify that will be:

  • Easier to setup then make.com or Zapier

  • Less expensive than make.com or Zapier

  • More detailed/advanced than existing integrations.

  • Available in the new monday.com ‘workflow builder’ feature as well as monday board automations.

You can join the growing waitlist here for early access and a future discount! Thanks in advance!
